节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Called to return a {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData} object. The {@code Want} object must include the form ID, form name, and grid style of the form. Such form information must be managed as persistent data for further form acquisition, update, and deletion.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the detailed information for creating a {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData}.
@returns { formBindingData.FormBindingData } Returns the created {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData} object.

parameters.说明: Indicates the detailed information for creating a {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData}.

节点.功能描述: Called when the form provider is notified that a temporary form is successfully converted to a normal form.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form.

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the form.

节点.功能描述: Called to notify the form provider to update a specified form.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form to update.
@param { Record<string, Object> } [wantParams] - Indicates the detailed information for updating the form.

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the form to update.
Record<string, Object> } [wantParams] - Indicates the detailed information for updating the form.

节点.功能描述: Called when the form provider receives form events from the system. object indicates the form ID, and the value indicates the event type, which can be either {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_VISIBLE} or {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_INVISIBLE}. {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_VISIBLE} means that the form becomes visible, {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_INVISIBLE} means that the form becomes invisible.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, number> } newStatus - Indicates the form events occurred. The key in the {@code Map}

parameters.说明: Indicates the form events occurred. The key in the {@code Map}

节点.功能描述: Called when a specified message event defined by the form provider is triggered. This method is valid only for JS forms. provided by the client to the form provider. is used to identify the specific component on which the event is triggered.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form on which the message event is triggered, which is
@param { string } message - Indicates the value of the {@code params} field of the message event. This parameter

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the form on which the message event is triggered, which is
Indicates the value of the {@code params} field of the message event. This parameter

节点.功能描述: Called to notify the form provider that a specified form has been destroyed. Override this method if you want your application, as the form provider, to be notified of form deletion.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the destroyed form.

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the destroyed form.

节点.功能描述: Called when the system configuration is updated.
注释信息: @param { Configuration } newConfig - Indicates the system configuration, such as language and color mode.

parameters.说明: Indicates the system configuration, such as language and color mode.

节点.功能描述:
Called to return a {@link FormState} object.

You must override this callback if you want this ability to return the actual form state. Otherwise, this method returns {@link FormState#DEFAULT} by default.

is obtained. The description covers the bundle name, ability name, module name, form name, and form dimensions.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the description of the form for which the {@link formInfo#FormState}

节点.功能描述: Called when the system shares the form.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form.
@returns { Record<string, Object> } Returns the wantParams object.

节点.功能描述: Called when the system acquire the form data.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form.
@returns { Record<string, Object> } Returns the wantParams object.

节点.功能描述: Called when this ability breaks the last link, notifying the provider that the provider process is about to stop.
